data.body: LANDING PREP done: rebased the 11-commit stack cleanly onto current main b1927e2a (clean auto-merge; CONTRIBUTING.md + _cli/__init__.py were the only 2 overlapping files). Greened each commit per-commit via git rebase --exec: canonical prompt front-matter (T13/T14/hedge/removal-rationale), module-size allowlist (det_floor+passes crossed 800, tree-aware per commit + architecture.md remedy rows), MCP explain_criterion classified in NO_SCHEMA_EXEMPT. All 11 commits retain Change-Id + rebar-ticket trailer. ModelHTTPError test failure is local-venv-only (main is green with pinned pydantic_ai; CI unaffected). Running full suite on the final state before pushing the Gerrit stacked changes to refs/for/main.
